description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a pip cache at .cache/pip and a cached virtualenv directory. Define a global before_script that runs python -V, installs virtualenv, creates a venv, and activates it for all jobs. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that installs sphinx and sphinx‑rtd‑theme, runs make html, moves build/html/ to ../public/, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Add a run job in the test stage that builds a wheel with python setup.py bdist_wheel, installs the wheel with pip install dist/*, and stores the resulting .whl files as artifacts. Add a test job in the test stage that runs python setup.py test, installs tox and flake8, executes tox -e py36 and flake8, using the PIP_CACHE_DIR variable set to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip.
